ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, bus) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel capacity of the vehicle in liters */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) for unique identification */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "service_interval" INTEGER /* Recommended service interval in kilometers or miles */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Predicted next service date based on the service interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition */,
  "temperature_inside" REAL /* Temperature inside the vehicle in degrees Celsius */,
  "temperature_outside" REAL /* Temperature outside the vehicle in degrees Celsius */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Amount of rainfall during the trip in mm */,
  "sunlight" REAL /* Amount of sunlight exposure during the trip in hours */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the trip in km/h */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity during the trip in percentage */,
  "air_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure during the trip in hPa */,
  "pollution_level" REAL /* Air pollution level during the trip */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the environmental conditions were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle that made the trip */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the trip in kilometers */,
  "fuel_consumed" REAL /* Amount of fuel consumed during the trip in liters */,
  "speed" REAL /* Average speed during the trip in km/h */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental condition during the trip */,
  "specials" TEXT /* Special conditions during the trip (e.g., traffic, roadwork) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the trip */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the trip */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who made the trip */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle during the trip in km/l */,
  "emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions during the trip in kg */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route taken during the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES environmental_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refills" (
  "refill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refill */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip during which the refill was made */,
  "liters" REAL /* Amount of fuel refilled in liters */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel refilled */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the refill was made */,
  "refill_location" TEXT /* Location where the refill was made */,
  "refill_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the refill */,
  "fuel_price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel price at the time of refill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refills_fuel_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_price_id") REFERENCES fuel_prices ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refills_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance task */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle that received the maintenance */,
  "task" TEXT /* Type of maintenance task (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance task was performed */,
  "mileage" REAL /* Mileage of the vehicle at the time of maintenance */,
  "next_service_interval" INTEGER /* Updated service interval after maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance task */,
  "part_replaced" TEXT /* Part(s) replaced during maintenance */,
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mechanic who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_mechanic_id FOREIGN KEY ("mechanic_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, fleet manager, driver) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the vehicle */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "assignment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the assignment (e.g., project, personal) */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* User who assigned the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_assignments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the vehicle */,
  "total_fuel_consumed" REAL /* Total fuel consumed by the vehicle */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the vehicle */,
  "total_emissions" REAL /* Total CO2 emissions for the vehicle */,
  "total_fuel_cost" REAL /* Total fuel cost for the vehicle */,
  "average_fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Average fuel efficiency of the vehicle */,
  "total_mileage" INTEGER /* Total mileage of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_summaries_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the fuel per liter */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the price was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_consumption_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the entry */,
  "fuel_consumed" REAL /* Amount of fuel consumed by the vehicle */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled by the vehicle */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle during the entry */,
  "emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions during the entry */,
  "refill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the refill associated with the entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_consumption_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_consumption_history_refill_id FOREIGN KEY ("refill_id") REFERENCES refills ("refill_id")
)
